short_summary: Iran deal uncertain, Tren de Aragua strike
rationale: Iran deal remains the dominant story for US residents given potential oil market and foreign policy implications; Tren de Aragua airstrike is a continuation of established pattern with limited new impact.

top_events.title: Trump says US-Iran deal to be signed Sunday; Tehran casts doubt
top_events.summary: A potential Iran nuclear deal could affect oil prices and US Middle East military posture, with direct implications for American consumers and foreign policy; uncertainty keeps markets on edge.

top_events.title: US kills leader of Venezuela's Tren de Aragua gang in air strike
top_events.summary: Trump administration confirms airstrike killing the Tren de Aragua leader — continuation of established gang-targeting operations with limited new impact on daily American life.

top_events.title: US asks Anthropic to block global access to top AI models
top_events.summary: Federal government pressure on Anthropic to restrict AI model access globally signals ongoing US national security concerns around AI — continuation of established policy direction.
